tests.name: TestIntradayBacktestEngine
tests.docstring: Test cases for the IntradayBacktestEngine class.

tests.name: OrderType
tests.docstring: Order types supported by the mock exchange.

tests.name: OrderStatus
tests.docstring: Order statuses supported by the mock exchange.

tests.name: OrderSide
tests.docstring: Order sides supported by the mock exchange.

tests.name: MockExchange
tests.docstring:
Mock implementation of an exchange for testing purposes.
    
    This class simulates an exchange that can accept and execute orders,
    maintain a simple order book, and provide market data for testing.

tests.name: MockMarketDataProvider
tests.docstring:
Mock implementation of a market data provider for testing purposes.
    
    This class simulates a market data provider that can generate synthetic
    price data or load test data from files.

tests.name: MockIBConnector
tests.docstring:
Mock implementation of IBConnector for testing purposes.
    
    This class mimics the behavior of the IBConnector class but uses
    simulated data rather than connecting to the Interactive Brokers API.

tests.name: TestAssetFactory
tests.docstring: Test cases for asset factory functions.

tests.name: ConcreteAsset
tests.docstring: Concrete implementation of Asset for testing.

tests.name: ConcreteAssetClass
tests.docstring: Concrete implementation of AssetClass for testing.

tests.name: TestAsset
tests.docstring: Test case for the Asset base class.

tests.name: TestAssetClass
tests.docstring: Test case for the AssetClass base class.

tests.name: TestFuturesAsset
tests.docstring: Test class for FuturesAsset.

tests.name: TestCryptoAsset
tests.docstring: Test cases for the CryptoAsset class.

tests.name: TestCryptoAssetClass
tests.docstring: Test cases for the CryptoAssetClass class.

tests.name: TestFixedIncomeAsset
tests.docstring: Test cases for the FixedIncomeAsset class.

tests.name: TestFixedIncomeAssetClass
tests.docstring: Test cases for the FixedIncomeAssetClass class.

tests.name: TestEquityAsset
tests.docstring: Test cases for the EquityAsset class.

tests.name: TestEquityAssetClass
tests.docstring: Test cases for the EquityAssetClass class.

tests.name: MockAsset
tests.docstring: Mock asset implementation for testing.

tests.name: TestMultiPairPortfolio
tests.docstring: Test cases for MultiPairPortfolio strategy.

tests.name: TestSignalGenerator
tests.docstring: Test class for SignalGenerator.

tests.name: TestCointegrationTests
tests.docstring: Test class for cointegration testing functions.

tests.name: TestRiskManager
tests.docstring: Test class for RiskManager.

tests.name: TestPaperTrader
tests.docstring: Test class for PaperTrader.

tests.name: TestDataProcessor
tests.docstring: Test class for DataProcessor.

tests.name: TestSpreadAnalyzer
tests.docstring: Test class for SpreadAnalyzer.

tests.name: TestMultiAssetIntegration
tests.docstring: Integration tests for multi-asset support.

tests.name: TestStrategyExecution
tests.docstring: Integration tests for the strategy execution flow.

tests.name: TestIBIntegration
tests.docstring: Integration tests with Interactive Brokers TWS.

tests.name: TestDataFlow
tests.docstring: Integration tests for the data flow between components.

codebase_review.name: CodebaseAnalyzer
codebase_review.docstring: Analyzes the codebase and generates reports.

src.name: PairsTradingStrategy
src.docstring:
Main class for the pairs trading strategy. Integrates all components:
    - Pair selection and cointegration testing
    - Spread calculation with dynamic hedge ratio
    - Signal generation
    - Position sizing and risk management

connectors.name: FixedIBConnector
connectors.docstring:
Fixed version of the IBConnector for testing integration with TWS.
    
    This class simplifies the IBConnector and fixes issues with the API calls.

connectors.name: IBConnector
connectors.docstring:
Interactive Brokers (IB) Connector for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.
    
    This class provides a high-level interface to Interactive Brokers for
    market data retrieval, order execution, and account management.

asset_classes.name: Asset
asset_classes.docstring:
Base class for all asset types.
    
    This abstract base class defines the interface that all assets must implement.

asset_classes.name: AssetClass
asset_classes.docstring:
Base class for all asset classes.
    
    This abstract base class defines the interface that all asset classes must implement.

asset_classes.name: FuturesAsset
asset_classes.docstring: Futures asset implementation for trading futures contracts.

asset_classes.name: CryptoAsset
asset_classes.docstring: Cryptocurrency asset implementation for trading digital currencies.

asset_classes.name: FixedIncomeAsset
asset_classes.docstring: Fixed Income asset implementation for trading bonds and other debt instruments.

asset_classes.name: EquityAsset
asset_classes.docstring: Equity asset implementation for trading stocks and ETFs.

reporting.name: BacktestReportGenerator
reporting.docstring:
Backtest Report Generator for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.
    
    This class creates comprehensive HTML reports from backtest results with
    interactive visualizations and metrics, making it easy to analyze and
    share backtest results.

config.name: ConfigurationManager
config.docstring:
Manages configuration settings for the pairs trading system.
    
    This class provides functionality to load, save, and access 
    configuration settings from various sources (JSON, YAML, etc.).

live_trading.name: TrackedLiveTrader
live_trading.docstring: LiveTrader extended with PositionTracker for comprehensive position management.

live_trading.name: MonitoredLiveTrader
live_trading.docstring: Combined LiveTrader and TradingMonitor for a full monitored live trading setup.

live_trading.name: TradingMonitor
live_trading.docstring:
Trading monitoring system that provides:
    - Performance tracking
    - Email/SMS notifications
    - Error detection and reporting
    - System health monitoring
    - Performance dashboard data

live_trading.name: LiveTrader
live_trading.docstring:
Live Trading implementation for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.
    
    This class provides a live trading environment that connects to Interactive Brokers
    for real market data and order execution, allowing for actual trading of strategies.

live_trading.name: PositionTracker
live_trading.docstring:
Position tracking system that provides:
    - Position lifecycle management
    - P&L calculation and tracking
    - Trade history recording
    - Position status reporting

strategies.name: MultiPairPortfolio
strategies.docstring:
Multi-pair portfolio strategy that manages multiple pairs simultaneously.
    This strategy balances risk across pairs and optimizes overall portfolio performance.

strategies.name: Strategy
strategies.docstring:
Base class for all trading strategies.
    
    This abstract base class defines the interface that all strategies must implement.

optimization.name: AdaptiveParameterManager
optimization.docstring:
Manages and applies regime-specific parameters for intraday trading.
    
    This class loads a configuration file with regime-specific parameters,
    detects the current market regime, and provides the appropriate parameters
    for the current market conditions.

optimization.name: IntradayParameterOptimizer
optimization.docstring:
Intraday Parameter Optimizer with regime-specific parameter optimization.
    
    This class extends GridSearchOptimizer to create regime-specific parameter
    sets for intraday trading strategies.

optimization.name: ParameterSpace
optimization.docstring:
Defines the parameter space for optimization.
    
    This class provides methods for defining the search space for parameters
    and for sampling from this space.

optimization.name: GeneticOptimizer
optimization.docstring:
Genetic Algorithm Optimizer for Pairs Trading Strategy.
    
    This class implements a genetic algorithm approach to find optimal parameters
    for the pairs trading strategy by evolving generations of parameter settings.

optimization.name: GridSearchOptimizer
optimization.docstring:
Grid Search Optimizer for Pairs Trading Strategy.
    
    This class implements a grid search approach to find optimal parameters
    for the pairs trading strategy.

optimization.name: WalkForwardTester
optimization.docstring:
Walk-Forward Testing Framework for Pairs Trading Strategy.
    
    This class implements a walk-forward testing approach that:
    1. Divides data into multiple training and testing windows
    2. Optimizes parameters on each training window
    3. Tests the optimal parameters on the subsequent out-of-sample testing window
    4. Aggregates results across all testing periods
    
    This approach provides a more realistic assessment of strategy performance
    and helps prevent overfitting to historical data.

signal_generation.name: PairsSignalGenerator
signal_generation.docstring: Generate trading signals for pairs trading strategies.

signal_generation.name: SpreadCalculator
signal_generation.docstring:
Class for calculating and normalizing spreads between two assets.
    Includes methods for static and dynamic (Kalman filter) hedge ratio calculations.

signals.name: SignalGenerator
signals.docstring:
Generates trading signals based on spread analysis.
    
    This class provides methods for generating entry and exit signals
    for pairs trading using various statistical approaches.

pair_trading.name: PairFinder
pair_trading.docstring: Pair finder class for identifying cointegrated pairs of assets.

cointegration.name: PairsFinder
cointegration.docstring: Identify cointegrated pairs of financial instruments.

cointegration.name: IntradayPairAnalyzer
cointegration.docstring: Analyze cointegration relationships at intraday timeframes.

strategy_variants.name: MLSignalStrategy
strategy_variants.docstring:
Machine Learning Signal Strategy for pairs trading that extends the base
    pairs trading strategy with advanced ML-based signal generation.
    
    This strategy uses machine learning models to predict the direction of
    the spread and generate trading signals.

strategy_variants.name: TimeSeriesStrategy
strategy_variants.docstring:
Time Series Strategy for pairs trading that extends the base
    pairs trading strategy with advanced time-series modeling.
    
    This strategy uses ARIMA, GARCH, VAR and other time-series models
    to forecast spreads and generate more robust trading signals.

data_processor.name: DataProcessor
data_processor.docstring:
Processes and manages data for the pairs trading system.
    
    This class provides functionality to load and preprocess data
    from various sources.

data_processor.name: FuturesDataProcessor
data_processor.docstring: Process futures data files into a standardized format for analysis.

data_processor.name: IntradayDataProcessor
data_processor.docstring: Specialized processor for intraday data with optimizations for pairs trading.

risk_management.name: PositionSizer
risk_management.docstring: Position sizer class for calculating appropriate position sizes.

risk_management.name: RiskManager
risk_management.docstring: Risk manager class for controlling risk in trading strategies.

backtest.name: BacktestEngine
backtest.docstring:
Backtesting engine for pairs trading strategies.
    
    This class provides functionality to simulate pairs trading strategies
    using historical data and calculate performance metrics.

backtest.name: IntradayBacktestEngine
backtest.docstring:
Specialized backtesting engine for intraday trading strategies.
    
    This class extends the base BacktestEngine with additional functionality
    specific to intraday trading, including:
    - Realistic time-of-day constraints
    - Sophisticated transaction cost modeling
    - Volume-based execution modeling
    - Liquidity-aware position sizing

paper_trading.name: PaperTrader
paper_trading.docstring:
Paper Trading implementation for the Intraday Statistical Arbitrage System.
    
    This class provides a paper trading environment that mimics real trading
    but with simulated order execution, allowing for strategy testing without
    risking real capital.

paper_trading.name: IntradayMLPaperTrader
paper_trading.docstring:
Paper trading implementation with ML enhancements for intraday trading.
    
    This class integrates the base PaperTrader with ML models for signal enhancement,
    regime detection, parameter adaptation, and real-time performance monitoring.

ml_enhancements.name: EnsembleModelFactory
ml_enhancements.docstring:
Factory class for creating and managing ensemble models.
    
    This class provides methods to create various types of ensemble models
    for classification and regression tasks in intraday trading.

ml_enhancements.name: ModelRetrainingManager
ml_enhancements.docstring:
Manages automated retraining of machine learning models for intraday trading.
    
    This class monitors model performance, detects when retraining is needed,
    and orchestrates the retraining process.

ml_enhancements.name: IntradayModelTrainer
ml_enhancements.docstring:
Trainer for machine learning models focused on intraday trading signals.
    
    This class supports training various model types with appropriate validation
    for time series financial data.

ml_enhancements.name: IntradayMLSystem
ml_enhancements.docstring:
Integrated ML system for intraday trading.
    
    This class connects ML model components with signal generation, regime detection,
    and the backtesting engine for a complete ML-enhanced intraday trading system.

ml_enhancements.name: WalkForwardValidator
ml_enhancements.docstring:
Implements walk-forward validation for time series data.
    
    Walk-forward validation is a technique where the model is trained on a rolling window 
    of data and then tested on subsequent data points, simulating real-life trading.

ml_enhancements.name: IntradaySignalEnhancer
ml_enhancements.docstring: Enhances statistical arbitrage signals with machine learning for intraday trading.

ml_enhancements.name: IntradaySignalProcessor
ml_enhancements.docstring: Process and apply intraday signal enhancements to a pairs trading strategy.

ml_enhancements.name: TimeSeriesAugmentation
ml_enhancements.docstring: Time series data augmentation techniques for financial data.

ml_enhancements.name: SpreadPredictor
ml_enhancements.docstring:
Spread Predictor for Pairs Trading.
    
    This class provides methods for training machine learning models to predict
    future spread movements and generating trading signals based on those predictions.

ml_enhancements.name: RegimeDetector
ml_enhancements.docstring:
Regime Detector for Pairs Trading.
    
    This class provides methods to detect breakdowns in cointegration relationships
    and regime shifts in spread behavior to avoid trading during unfavorable conditions.

ml_enhancements.name: MarketRegimeClassifier
ml_enhancements.docstring: Detect market regimes to adapt trading parameters.

ml_enhancements.name: IntradayFeatureEngineering
ml_enhancements.docstring: Generate and analyze features specifically for intraday trading strategies.

ml_enhancements.name: AdvancedFeatureEngineering
ml_enhancements.docstring:
Advanced feature engineering for intraday trading.
    
    This class extends the base IntradayFeatureEngineering class with more sophisticated
    features for improved model performance.

ml_enhancements.name: FeatureGenerator
ml_enhancements.docstring:
Feature Generator for Pairs Trading.
    
    This class provides methods to create advanced features for improving signal
    generation in pairs trading strategies.

portfolio.name: PairsPortfolio
portfolio.docstring: Manage a portfolio of pairs trades.

spread_analytics.name: SpreadAnalyzer
spread_analytics.docstring: Spread analyzer class for analyzing spreads between assets.

performance.name: SparseTimeSeries
performance.docstring:
Memory-efficient sparse time series optimized for financial data.
    
    This class provides a sparse representation of time series data that:
    1. Uses significantly less memory for series with missing values
    2. Maintains time ordering for efficient lookup and operations
    3. Supports common time series operations and interpolation methods

performance.name: SparseTimeSeriesRolling
performance.docstring: Helper class for rolling window operations on SparseTimeSeries.

performance.name: SparseTimeSeriesEWM
performance.docstring: Helper class for exponentially weighted operations on SparseTimeSeries.

performance.name: CompressedOHLC
performance.docstring:
Memory-efficient compressed OHLC (Open, High, Low, Close) data structure.
    
    This class provides a memory-efficient representation of OHLC data by:
    1. Using compact numpy arrays for data storage
    2. Supporting efficient lookups and operations
    3. Allowing conversion to pandas DataFrames when needed

performance.name: RollingWindow
performance.docstring:
Efficient Rolling Window for time series data.
    
    This class provides an efficient implementation of a rolling window
    for time series data, with support for various statistics and custom functions.
    
    It uses an efficient algorithm that updates statistics incrementally
    as new values are added, avoiding redundant calculations.

performance.name: ExponentialRollingWindow
performance.docstring:
Exponential Rolling Window for time series data.
    
    This class provides an implementation of an exponential moving window
    that weighs recent observations more heavily, with exponentially
    decreasing weights for older observations.

performance.name: TaskStatus
performance.docstring: Status of a task in the task pool.

performance.name: Task
performance.docstring: Task metadata for the task pool.

performance.name: TaskPool
performance.docstring:
Task Pool for managing long-running parallel tasks.
    
    This class provides methods for submitting, managing, and monitoring tasks
    with support for prioritization, cancellation, and automatic resource management.

performance.name: ParallelExecutor
performance.docstring:
Parallel Executor for running tasks in parallel.
    
    This class provides methods for executing tasks in parallel using either
    process-based or thread-based parallelism, with support for progress tracking
    and error handling.

performance.name: _TimedCache
performance.docstring: Internal class for implementing timed caching.

performance.name: DataCache
performance.docstring:
Data Cache for storing and retrieving frequently used data.
    
    This class provides methods for caching data in memory or on disk,
    with support for expiration, automatic eviction, and memory management.
